sections.paragraph:
ἵππος, ου, ὁ (s. two prec. entries; Hom.+) horse, steed Js 3:3; Rv 9:9; 14:20; 18:13; 19:18. Horses of var. colors play a large role in Rv (s. on πυρρός): a white horse (Aeneas Tact. 1488) 6:2; 19:11, 14; cp. vss. 19, 21; fiery red 6:4; black vs. 5; pale, dun vs. 8. Grasshoppers like horses 9:7; horses w. lions’ heads vs. 17; cp. 19. S. MMüller, D. apokal. Reiter: ZNW 8, 1907, 290ff; GHoennicke, D. apokal. Reiter: Studierstube 19, 1921, 3ff; AvHarnack, D. apokal. Reiter: Erforschtes u. Erlebtes 1923, 53ff; LKöhler, D. Offenb. d. Joh. 1924, 59–68; Boll 78ff, agreeing w. him GBaldensperger, RHPR 4, 1924, 1ff, against him JFreundorfer, Die Apk. des Ap. Joh. 1929, 67–123; FDornseiff, ZNW 38, ’39, 196f; B. 167f; BHHW III 1438f; Pauly-W. XIX 2, 1430–44; Kraft, Hdb. ’74, 114–18.—DELG. M-M. TW.

prec. prec. = preceding

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

var. var. = various(ly)

Aeneas Aeneas Tact , IV b.c.—List 5

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

ZNW ZNW = Zeitschrift für die ntl. Wissenschaft—List 6

Joh. Joh. = Johannine

Boll Boll = FB., Aus der Offenb. Johannis—List 6

RHPR RHPR = Revue d’histoire et de philosophie religieuses—List 6

  1. B. = CDBuck, A Dictionary of Selected Synonyms—List 6

BHHW BHHW = Biblisch-historisches Handwörterbuch—List 6

Pauly-W Pauly-W = AP./GW., Real-Encyclopädie der klassischen Altertumswissenschaft—List 6

Hdb. Hdb. = Handbuch (in connection with a specific NT book, the ref. is to a commentary in the series Handbuch zum Neuen Testament, founded by HLietzmann)—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 480
